rationale: Accepted CP5 rows replay through production BattleSubjectKind diagnostic route subjects emitted as BattleEntrypointTrace route events and compared through adapter qRoute projection for after-hit rider, spell-hosted weapon attack, held-weapon active-effect, and weapon damage rider substrates. Pre-hit weapon steps, pure scenario transitions, ordinary weapon-hosted target/attack-roll rows, MagicWeaponTargetItem holes absent from the copied reducer-route vocabulary, and out-of-scope Shining Smite rows remain target-blocked. Component projection smoke is not counted as accepted route evidence.
